---
title: "Niklaus Wirth (1934–2024)"
description: "Niklaus Wirth — gave us ALGOL W, Pascal, Modula, Oberon. \"In Europe I'm called by name, but in the US I'm called by value.\""
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-01-04"
categories: [computer science, history, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Niklaus Wirth. Image: Wikipedia. ([Source](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Niklaus_Wirth))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

"In Europe I'm called by name, but in the US I'm called by value."

Thank you, Niklaus Wirth (February 15, 1934 – January 1, 2024), for bringing us so many wonderful programming languages: ALGOL W, Pascal (which I cut my teeth on), Modula, Oberon, etc.

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_niklaus-wirth-wikipedia-activity-7148692059078426624-RScG).*
